mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE MEM_ID = #{memId} AND MEM_STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE MEM_NICKNAME = #{memNickName} AND MEM_STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER VALUES (#{memId}, #{memPwd}, #{memName}, #{memNickName}, DEFAULT, #{memAddress}, #{memPhone}, #{memEmail}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM MEMBER join grade on(GRA_NAME = MEM_RATING) WHERE MEM_ID = #{memId} AND MEM_STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT * FROM ADDRESS WHERE MEM_ID = #{id} AND ADD_STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY ADD_DEFAULT DESC, ADD_NO DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE MEMBER SET MEM_STATUS = 'N' WHERE MEM_ID IN
#{item}
